name: feature.crm.nodes
description: CRM feature node pack (ADR 0001 §4 / ADR 0014) — contact-triage nodes (the two basic/enriched variants back the CRM toggle's A/B bindings) PLUS read nodes over the ctx.features.crm surface (companies / deals / tasks) so a workflow can read CRM data. Reads are role:action (recorded → replay/fork-safe), tenant+org-guarded (CTI-1).
author: OpenWOP App

nodes.label: CRM Triage (basic)
nodes.description: Rule-based contact triage — scores a contact from its stage. The `basic` variant binding.

nodes.label: CRM Triage (enriched)
nodes.description: Enriched contact triage — adds company-signal weighting. The `enriched` variant binding.

nodes.label: CRM: List Companies
nodes.description: Lists an org's CRM companies over ctx.features.crm.listCompanies. Inputs: { orgId, q? }. Output: { companies }. Tenant+org-guarded (CTI-1).

nodes.label: CRM: Get Company
nodes.description: Fetches one CRM company by id over ctx.features.crm.getCompany. Inputs: { orgId, companyId }. Output: { company } (null when absent). Tenant+org-guarded.

nodes.label: CRM: List Deals
nodes.description: Lists an org's CRM deals over ctx.features.crm.listDeals. Inputs: { orgId, pipelineId?, stageId?, companyId?, q? }. Output: { deals }. Tenant+org-guarded.

nodes.label: CRM: Get Deal
nodes.description: Fetches one CRM deal by id over ctx.features.crm.getDeal. Inputs: { orgId, dealId }. Output: { deal } (null when absent). Tenant+org-guarded.

nodes.label: CRM: List Tasks
nodes.description: Lists an org's CRM tasks over ctx.features.crm.listTasks. Inputs: { orgId, status?, dealId? }. Output: { tasks }. Tenant+org-guarded.
